newQuiz.stem: ___ had I sat down ___ the phone started ringing again.
newQuiz.explanation: Hardly/Scarcely ... when ... 與 No sooner ... than ... 都表「一…就…」。句首倒裝為 Hardly had I + p.p.，後半須搭配 when，故選 Hardly ... when。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ No sooner 必須配 than（不是 when），Hardly/Scarcely 才配 when；倒裝用了 had（過去完成）排除 As soon as，又因兩個空格須成對，唯一正確配對是 Hardly ... when。

newQuiz.stem: She is good not only at singing ___ at dancing, which makes her the star of the show.
newQuiz.explanation: not only A but also B 為固定成對連接詞（不僅 A 而且 B），故空格填 but also。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ not only 的固定搭配是 but also（不是 and also）；as well 須以 as well as 形式出現且不與 not only 配對，別被「也」的中文語感誤導成 and also。

newQuiz.stem: ___ you study or play, you should always do your best — that's my father's motto.
newQuiz.explanation: Whether A or B 表「無論是 A 還是 B」，引導讓步副詞子句。句意為「無論讀書或玩」，故用 Whether。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Whether（無論）才能引導子句並配 or；Either 配 or 是連接對等項而非引導完整子句作主句的狀語，且此處需「無論…都…」的讓步語氣；Weather（天氣）為同音陷阱。

newQuiz.stem: The harder you work, ___ you will become — success doesn't come by luck.
newQuiz.explanation: 「The + 比較級 ..., the + 比較級 ...」表「越…就越…」。前半 The harder，後半須對應 the more successful。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 此句型後半也必須有 the，且 successful 為多音節形容詞須用 the more successful（不是 the successful 或 more successful）；漏掉 the 或誤用最高級皆錯。

newQuiz.stem: He spoke so fast ___ none of us could follow what he was saying.
newQuiz.explanation: so + 形容詞/副詞 + that 表「如此…以致於…」。此處 so fast that 引導結果子句，故填 that。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 已有 so（修飾副詞 fast），結果子句只需 that；so that 是「為了」表目的且不與前面的 so 並用，such that 須搭配名詞（such + n. + that），此處是副詞故用 so ... that。

newQuiz.stem: ___ the weather was terrible, the rescue team kept searching for the missing climbers all night.
newQuiz.explanation: 空格後接完整子句（the weather was terrible），須用「連接詞」Even though（即使／儘管），表讓步。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Despite / In spite of 是「介系詞」只能接名詞或動名詞，不能接子句；後面是 the weather was terrible（含主詞+動詞的子句），故須用連接詞 Even though，別被「儘管」的中文誤導選成介系詞。

newQuiz.stem: Take this umbrella with you; ___ you'll get soaked in the heavy rain on the way home.
newQuiz.explanation: 前句建議帶傘，後句說明「否則」會淋濕，前後為「條件—不利後果」關係，用 otherwise（否則，= or else）。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ otherwise 表「否則／不然」連接「未照做的負面後果」；therefore（因此）是順承結果、however（然而）是轉折、moreover（此外）是補充，皆不符「不帶傘就會淋濕」的假設語氣。

newQuiz.stem: ___ he is rich, he is far from happy; money alone cannot buy a peaceful mind.
newQuiz.explanation: 讓步倒裝句型「形容詞 + as/though + 主詞 + be」表「雖然…」，正確語序為 Rich as he is（= Although he is rich）。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 此讓步倒裝須把形容詞提到句首：Rich as he is；不可寫成 As rich he is，也不可 as 與 though 並用（Rich though...或 Rich as... 擇一），故唯一正確是 Rich as he is。

newQuiz.stem: I will lend you the book ___ you promise to return it by Friday.
newQuiz.explanation: 「我會借你書，只要你答應週五前還」表正向條件，as long as（只要）= if，引導條件子句。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ as long as（只要）引導肯定條件；unless（除非＝if not）會使語意反轉成「除非你答應…否則才借」邏輯不通，in case（以防）、even if（即使）也不符「附帶條件才借」之意。

newQuiz.stem: Neither the teachers nor the principal ___ aware of the change in the exam schedule.
newQuiz.explanation: neither ... nor ... 連接兩主詞時動詞依「就近原則」與最靠近的 the principal（單數）一致，故用 is。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ neither A nor B 的動詞看「最靠近」的 B（the principal 單數）→ is；雖然前面有複數 the teachers，但就近原則以 nor 後的單數為準，別誤用 are/were。

newQuiz.stem: It won't be long ___ the new high-speed rail connects the two cities.
newQuiz.explanation: It won't be long before ... 為固定句型，表「不久之後就會…」。故填 before。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ It will/won't be long before... 是固定搭配，意為「不久就…」；此處不可用 until（It won't be long until 並非標準用法），before 才能正確表達「在…之前不會太久」。

newQuiz.stem: He ran to the station as fast as he could, ___ he still missed the train.
newQuiz.explanation: only to + V 表「結果卻（出乎意料地）…」。拼命跑到車站卻仍錯過火車，用 only to find that 表意外的負面結果。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ only to（不料卻…）表非預期的負面結果；so that / in order that 表「目的」（為了），now that 表「既然」，皆不符「努力後卻落空」的轉折，別把結果誤當目的。

newQuiz.stem: ___ you have made up your mind, there's no point in arguing about it any further.
newQuiz.explanation: Now that 表「既然／由於現在…」，引導原因子句。句意「既然你已下定決心，再爭也沒意義」。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Now that（既然）兼具時間與原因，引導「已成立的前提」；So that（為了/以致）、In case（以防）、By the time（到…時候）皆不符「既然…就別再…」的因果語氣。

newQuiz.stem: The plan sounds perfect in theory; ___, it is almost impossible to carry out in real life.
newQuiz.explanation: 前句「理論上完美」與後句「現實幾乎無法執行」為強烈轉折，用 nevertheless（然而、儘管如此）。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 前後語意對立（理論完美 vs 現實做不到）須用轉折詞 nevertheless；as a result（因此）順承、in addition（此外）補充、for instance（舉例）皆不符對比邏輯。

newQuiz.stem: ___ both of them apologized ___ the manager forgave them, for the damage was simply too great.
newQuiz.explanation: 句意「兩人都道歉了，但經理也沒原諒他們」其實是『兩者皆未發生原諒』的全否；空格為「Neither A nor B」結構，表「既沒…也沒…」，配合後句「損失太大」最合理。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Although/Even though 是連接詞不可與 but/yet 並用（英文擇一），故排除前兩項；Whether...or 表「無論」語意不合。Neither A nor B（兩者皆否）才能呼應「道歉也沒原諒（皆未成立）」的全盤否定。

newQuiz.stem: Read the dialogue: A: "Will the picnic be cancelled?" B: "___ it rains, we'll move it indoors, so don't worry." Choose the best word for the blank.
newQuiz.explanation: B 說「就算下雨，我們也會移到室內」，表示讓步——即使下雨野餐照辦，用 Even if（即使）最能傳達「不必擔心」。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Even if（即使）強調「下雨也照常」的安撫語氣；Unless（除非＝if not）會變成「除非下雨否則移室內」邏輯顛倒，In case（以防萬一）語氣較弱不貼合「別擔心」，As though（彷彿）語意不通。

newQuiz.stem: Look at the sign: "Keep quiet in the library ___ others can concentrate on their reading." The blank means the purpose of the rule. Choose the best answer.
newQuiz.explanation: 標示說明保持安靜的『目的』是讓他人能專心閱讀，目的副詞子句用 so that（為了…）。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 表「目的」用 so that + 子句；單獨的 so 表「結果」、because 表「原因」（方向相反，是因為別人要專心才安靜嗎？語意不順），such that 需搭名詞，故正解 so that。

newQuiz.stem: From the weather report: "It will be sunny in the morning; ___, a sudden storm may hit the coast by evening." Choose the connector that fits the contrast.
newQuiz.explanation: 上午晴、傍晚卻可能有暴風雨，前後天氣對比，用 on the other hand（另一方面、相對地）表轉折對照。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 前後為對比關係用 on the other hand；thus（因此）順承、likewise（同樣地）表類比、in conclusion（總之）為總結，皆無法表達「晴 vs 暴風雨」的相反走向。

newQuiz.stem: ___ how hard the problem looks, our teacher always reminds us never to give up.
newQuiz.explanation: No matter how + 形容詞/副詞 表「無論多麼…」，引導讓步子句。No matter how hard = 無論多難。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 後接 how + adj.（how hard）須用 No matter；However 雖也可接形容詞（However hard），但 However how 連用是錯的，此處空格後緊跟 how，故只能是 No matter how；Despite 為介系詞不接子句，Whatever 須接名詞。

newQuiz.stem: She had ___ finished her homework ___ the power suddenly went out across the whole neighborhood.
newQuiz.explanation: 「一…就…」句型中，hardly/scarcely/barely 配 when，no sooner 配 than。此處兩空為 barely ... when，正確成對。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 配對規則：hardly/scarcely/barely → when；no sooner → than。選項 1(no sooner...when)、2(scarcely...than)、3(hardly...than)皆配錯，唯有 barely ... when 正確；別把 than 與 when 混用。

newQuiz.stem: Study the chart of two students' scores: Tom rose from 60 to 90, ___ Mary dropped from 85 to 70 over the same term. Choose the connector showing the contrast.
newQuiz.explanation: Tom 進步、Mary 退步，同一學期內形成對比，用 while（然而、相對地）表「對比」用法最恰當。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ while 除「當…時」外亦可表「然而／相對」的對比，正好連接 Tom 升、Mary 降；since（既然/自從）、as（因為/當）、for（因為）都偏「原因/時間」而非「對比」，會誤把對照關係讀成因果。
